deliverable_classes.action_handoff: Brainstorm action plan/checklist routed to feat-harness, openspec change, or local plan file.
deliverable_classes.memory_handoff: Brainstorm summary routed to living-docs inbox when available, otherwise local summary file.
deliverable_classes.archive: Archive record under .bagakit/brainstorm/archive with explicit destination evidence.

profiles.default_mode: Write local plan + local summary and archive their paths when no driver system is detected.

deliverable_classes.action_handoff: Feat/task lifecycle transitions with strict task commit protocol and final feat archive state.
deliverable_classes.memory_handoff: Optional result/decision/gotcha summaries to living-docs inbox when detected.
deliverable_classes.archive: Physical feat archive under .bagakit/ft-harness/feats-archived plus status transition evidence.

profiles.default_mode: Operate fully standalone using local harness state, worktrees, and script-driven transitions.
archive_gate: Feat is merged and eligible for archive.
Archived state and destination are explicit in harness state.

deliverable_classes.action_handoff: System docs, SOP, and managed AGENTS block updates applied in target project.
deliverable_classes.memory_handoff: Inbox/memory capture and promotion under docs/.bagakit/{inbox,memory}.
deliverable_classes.archive: Task completion evidence reported with updated docs and memory destinations.

profiles.default_mode: Operate on local docs and memory tree without requiring any external execution system.
system_routes: Contract/signal exchange with other skills via optional artifacts
archive_gate: Completion evidence includes touched docs/memory paths.

deliverable_classes.action_handoff: Single-item progression and next-action decisions in normalized execution table.
deliverable_classes.memory_handoff: Execution handoff summary and rationale artifacts for next session.
deliverable_classes.archive: Completion delegated to upstream system archive (for example feat-harness/openspec) or local fallback note.

profiles.default_mode: Drive .bagakit/long-run loop standalone with manual rows when no upstream adapter is available.
system_routes: Manual adapter rows for other systems
archive_gate: If upstream archive exists, destination id/path is recorded.
If no upstream archive exists, local fallback archive destination is recorded.

deliverable_classes.action_handoff: New/improved skill structure, trigger design, and validator-backed contract updates.
deliverable_classes.memory_handoff: Design rationale captured in references and validation matrix outputs.
deliverable_classes.archive: Validation evidence reports output routes and archive gate readiness.

profiles.default_mode: Scaffold and validate skill repos locally with standalone-first defaults.
system_routes: Optional compatibility guidance for feat-harness, openspec, and living-docs adapters
archive_gate: Output map includes default and adapter routes.
Action/memory destinations are explicit in archive policy.
